sentences.arabic: اكْتَشَفَ عُلَمَاءُ الْأَحْيَاءِ نَوْعًا جَدِيدًا مِنَ الْأَسْمَاكِ فِي نَهْرٍ كَبِيرٍ جَنُوبَ الْبِلَادِ.
sentences.translation: Biolozi su otkrili novu vrstu ribe u velikoj rijeci na jugu zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: Biologists have discovered a new species of fish in a large river in the south of the country.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمِيَّزُ هَذَا النَّوْعُ بِأَلْوَانِهِ الزَّاهِيَةِ وَحَجْمِهِ الصَّغِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta se odlikuje živim bojama i malim veličinom.
sentences.translationEn: This species is distinguished by its bright colours and small size.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَئِيسُ فَرِيقِ الْبَحْثِ إِنَّ هَذَا الِاكْتِشَافَ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِعِلْمِ الْأَحْيَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Šef istraživačkog tima rekao je da je ovo otkriće veoma važno za biologiju.
sentences.translationEn: The head of the research team said that this discovery is very important for biology.

sentences.arabic: سَيُعْطِي الْعُلَمَاءُ هَذَا النَّوْعَ الْجَدِيدَ اسْمًا رَسْمِيًّا قَرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Naučnici će uskoro dati ovoj novoj vrsti službeno ime.
sentences.translationEn: Scientists will give the new species an official name soon.

sentences.arabic: تَسْعَى الْحُكُومَةُ إِلَى حِمَايَةِ النَّهْرِ وَمَنْعِ الصَّيْدِ فِيهِ حَتَّى تَنْمُوَ أَعْدَادُ هَذِهِ الْأَسْمَاكِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada nastoji zaštititi rijeku i zabraniti ribolov u njoj kako bi se broj ovih riba povećao.
sentences.translationEn: The government seeks to protect the river and ban fishing in it so that the fish population can grow.
